27 February 2023 Online English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES)

Foreign Languages Unit English Preparatory Programme 2022-2023 Academic Year Fall Semester Remotely Proctored Online DÜİYES Guidelines

Dear Students,

2022-2023 Fall Term English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will be administered online on Monday, February 27, 2023 and will be remotely invigilated. The exam consists of two sessions and the students are required to attend both sessions.

The exam will be administered at 14:30 at

douonlineydb.dogus.edu.tr

.  Students are obliged to approve PDP INFORMATION and EXPLICIT CONSENT TEXT on the platform prior to the start of their exam. All students must attend classes in Microsoft Teams where they were placed at

14.00 for the first session

and at

16.15 for the second session

. Students must have a valid ID with photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license) during the exam.

Students who do not want to attend the online exam with remote monitoring must state their exam preferences by sending an e-mail to

[email protected]

address via their e-mail address by

February 23, 17:00

. Those students can take the invigilated exam without a camera and microphone in the Computer Laboratory B1-04 located in Dudullu Campus.

Students who do not state their preference to take the exam in Dudullu Campus with a written document until the stated deadline will be assumed to have preferred to sit the exam online with their camera and microphone turned on outside of the campus.

* Information about the exam will be mailed to the students on

Friday, February 24, 2023.

Paylaş
